author: jochembrouwer
content:
Opened this PR to include code in the style matching EIP-7002 / EIP-7252 https://github.com/ethereum/EIPs/pull/11856 ( <@194432762315407360> could you re-check the code? It should be correct)

<@1126229231572094976> <@411317441688371202> I also added this comment: https://github.com/ethereum/EIPs/pull/11856/changes#r3517133065, please review.
It is unclear to me why we want to make the state transition part of this EIP specification, it seems too much to me. It also implies that this should be tested - but this thus also requires a client which supports such irregular state transition to test it 🤔 

Unless there is a clear reason to include irregular state transaction + these nonce rules in the EIP 🤔
